attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WPSACD.POS_SCAAC_KEY,                 
WPSACD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,           
WPSACD.PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,         
WPSACD.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,   
WPSACD.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMT,   
WPSACD.PD_SALES_REP_NUM,              
WPSACD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,    
WPSACD.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,        
WPSACD.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,        
WPSACD.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,  
WPSACD.PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,    
WPSACD.SK_NET_CHANGE_CREDITS_ID_INT,  
WPSACD.PD_TRANSACTION_DT,             
WPSACD.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,       
WPSACD.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,              
WPSACD.PD_SS_CD,                      
WPSACD.PD_ADJUSTMENT_DT , 
WPSACD.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,          
WPSACD.PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,   
WPSACD.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG,             
WPSACD.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
WPSACD.PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,      
WPSACD.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,  
WPSACD.PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
WPSACD.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
WPSACD.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD, 
WPSACD.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
WPSACD.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
WPSACD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,               
WPSACD.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,              
WPSACD.START_TV_DTM,                  
WPSACD.END_TV_DTM,
WPSACD.SK3_SC_ID_INT,                                                          /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
WPSACD.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,                                          /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
WPSACD.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,                                     /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
WPSACD.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,                          /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
WPSACD.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,                                    /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
WPSACD.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG,                  /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */      
WPSACD.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,   
WPSACD.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG     ,
WPSACD.EXPIRATION_DTM,
WPSACD.DV_EXPIRATION_DT,
WPSACD.SALES_CREDIT_START_DTM,
WPSACD.DV_SALES_CREDIT_START_DT,
WPSACD.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM  $$WORKDB.W_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_DIRECT WPSACD
WHERE WPSACD.DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_DIRECT_TV NPSACDT
WHERE NPSACDT.POS_SCAAC_KEY = WPSACD.POS_SCAAC_KEY)
